query:
INSERT INTO products (company, name, category, description, features, riskLevel, minPremium, maxPremium, targetAudience, competitorFlag) VALUES
('Northwestern Mutual', 'NWM Custom Whole Life', 'whole_life', 'Participating whole life policy with guaranteed cash value growth and dividend potential. Strong financial ratings and long history.', '["Guaranteed cash value","Annual dividends","Paid-up additions","Flexible premium options"]', 'low', 5000, 100000, 'Conservative investors seeking guaranteed growth and legacy planning', 1),
('Northwestern Mutual', 'NWM Select Term', 'term_life', 'Competitive term life insurance with conversion privileges. Available in 10, 15, 20, and 30-year terms.', '["Conversion privilege","Level premiums","Accelerated death benefit","Waiver of premium"]', 'low', 500, 15000, 'Budget-conscious families needing temporary coverage', 1),
('MassMutual', 'MassMutual Whole Life 200', 'whole_life', 'Participating whole life with strong dividend history. Offers guaranteed death benefit and cash value accumulation.', '["Guaranteed cash value","Dividend participation","Paid-up additions rider","Chronic illness rider"]', 'low', 3000, 75000, 'Long-term wealth builders seeking guarantees', 1),
('MassMutual', 'MassMutual CareChoice One', 'ltc', 'Single-premium hybrid life/LTC policy. Provides long-term care benefits with life insurance death benefit.', '["Single premium","LTC benefit pool","Return of premium","Inflation protection option"]', 'moderate', 50000, 500000, 'Pre-retirees concerned about long-term care costs', 1),
('Prudential', 'PruLife Index Advantage UL', 'iul', 'Index universal life with multiple index options and a fixed account. Offers flexible premiums and adjustable death benefit.', '["Multiple index options","Fixed account option","No-lapse guarantee","Chronic illness rider"]', 'moderate_high', 2000, 100000, 'Growth-oriented clients seeking market-linked returns with downside protection', 1),
('Prudential', 'Prudential Term Essential', 'term_life', 'Affordable term life with simplified underwriting. Quick issue for healthy applicants.', '["Simplified underwriting","Quick issue","Conversion option","Accelerated death benefit"]', 'low', 300, 10000, 'Young families and first-time buyers', 1),
('Guardian', 'Guardian Disability Income', 'disability', 'Comprehensive individual disability income insurance with own-occupation definition and strong riders.', '["Own-occupation definition","Cost of living rider","Future increase option","Residual disability benefit"]', 'moderate', 1000, 20000, 'High-income professionals protecting earning power', 1),
('Guardian', 'Guardian Whole Life', 'whole_life', 'Participating whole life with competitive dividends. Strong mutual company backing with consistent performance.', '["Participating dividends","Guaranteed cash value","Paid-up additions","Estate planning features"]', 'low', 4000, 80000, 'Conservative wealth accumulators seeking guaranteed growth', 1);
